title: apium ammi
intro: Apium ammi, also known as wild celery or sea celery, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Apium ammi include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Apium ammi can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
